title: Alzheimer disease-gene discovery on the STRING interactome: network propagation vs spectral learning, with conformal candidate sets
description: Disease-gene prioritisation for Alzheimer disease on the human STRING protein-protein interaction network. Random-walk-with-restart network propagation is benchmarked against a spectral-embedding + random-forest learner under identical seed-recovery folds, and split-conformal prediction turns the gene ranking into a candidate set with a finite-sample coverage guarantee. Seeds are drawn live from Open Targets; the interactome streams from STRING on first run.
